description: Share your seasonal discounts for top products with this Christmas email template. The festive gold design will surely stand out amongst other holiday emails. Customize the template with quality product images and bold copy in those visible CTAs.

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))
